summary: K9Command New Features Testing Complete - Iteration 17. All 18 backend tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) UnboundLocalError for mg_setting in meet_greet booking, 2) EmailService missing template_name parameter. All new features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test customers, dogs, and bookings during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Meet & Greet booking type, cash payment option, CSV exports, automated welcome emails. Email system is MOCKED (stored in email_outbox collection). BookingModal UI shows all new options correctly.

ui_verification.booking_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows Stay, Daycare, Meet & Greet

bugs_fixed.issue: UnboundLocalError: cannot access local variable 'mg_setting' in meet_greet booking
bugs_fixed.fix: Added mg_setting query inside the meet_greet pricing block
bugs_fixed.impact: Meet & Greet bookings were returning 500 error

bugs_fixed.fix: Added template_name parameter to send_email method signature
